title: 2025/09/11 - PP
displayTitle: 2025-09-11 - Primary Production Committee - Petition of Ian Sizer: Madagascar Ragwort – A growing concern for Northland and the rest of New Zealand
topic: Petition of Ian Sizer: Madagascar Ragwort – A growing concern for Northland and the rest of New Zealand
description: Thursday, 11 September 2025 | Primary Production Committee Petition of Ian Sizer: Madagascar Ragwort – A growing concern for Northland and the rest of New Zealand Hearing of Evidence Ian Sizer Geoff Crawford, Northland Regional Council Chair Pāmu Landcorp Farming Limited - Mark Leslie, Chief Executive - Will Burrett, Chief Operating Officer - Kara Tait, Head of Comms & Engagement
descriptionSummary: Petition of Ian Sizer: Madagascar Ragwort – A growing concern for Northland and the rest of New Zealand. Ian Sizer. Geoff Crawford, Northland Regional Council Chair
